title: Evangelion DECADE Memorial box PSP question
display_title: Evangelion DECADE Memorial box PSP question
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion ~DECADE~ Memorial box PSP question             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Mon Nov 18, 2013 12:56 pm Does anyone what comes with this? I got this off of ebay and am wondering if I have everything. The PSP game seems to be complete but the the feature film case has the 2 UMDs but not a booklet like the game came with. So do I have everything for this release? Also did it come with an OBI because mine doesn't have one. [URL=http://s25.photobucket.com/user/innocencesarion/media/IMG_2261_zps3586da58.jpg.html] [/URL] [URL=http://s25.photobucket.com/user/innocencesarion/media/IMG_2262_zps3827542a.jpg.html] [/URL] [URL=http://s25.photobucket.com/user/innocencesarion/media/IMG_2264_zps000eb4b0.jpg.html] [/URL] [URL=http://s25.photobucket.com/user/innocencesarion/media/IMG_2263_zps91ffa091.jpg.html] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 18, 2013 6:24 pm I own this. The PSP movie included is the Renewal (remastered) version of Death and EoE. Note that unless you have a Japanese PSP, the movies will not play. UMD movies are region encoded but UMD games are region free. So the NGE2 PSP video game (a port/update of the NGE2 PS2 game) will play just fine. The only included booklets/ads are for the NGE2 video game. Mine didn't come with an obi strap either. Specs etc here: http://svenge.pcriot.com/evasite/umd.htm

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Mon Nov 18, 2013 7:19 pm I was an idiot and tried it on my US PSP even though it clearly shows region 2. I wish there was a booklet it seems weird without one. I ask here instead of starting a new thread I also got the music DVDs in the mail that came today as well. without the OBI. Did Remix ever had a booklet? the other one does. Glad I paid about $8.00 (I bought it with other things.) Svenge doesn't say if it includes booklets Also unfortunately my copy of the Decade box doesn't have the back paper that shows the game and movie info.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Tue Nov 19, 2013 2:18 pm These are very pretty boxes, I must say

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 19, 2013 6:15 pm ILUVASUKALANGLEY wrote: Also unfortunately my copy of the Decade box doesn't have the back paper that shows the game and movie info.
